title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an Associate Professor at CU Boulder, advocates for teaching AI through manual, human-paced methods that prioritize mathematical foundations over latest tools. He argues this approach builds durable skills that survive hype cycles and allows people to shape AI rather than vice versa.
